title: Pesticide Product Information Database - Open Government Portal
content:
## Pesticide Product Information Database
The Pesticide Product Information Database allows the public to view information on products, active ingredients, and programs related to pesticides and other pest control products that are regulated by Pest Management Regulatory Agency.
- Publisher - Current Organization Name: Health Canada
- Licence: Open Government Licence - Canada
- Pesticide Product Information Database - application CSV English api CSV Explore More information Go to resource
- Pesticide Product Information Database - application CSV French api CSV Explore More information Go to resource

- Pesticide Product Information Database - product CSV French api CSV Explore More information Go to resource

- Licensed Natural Health Products
- Regulatory Directive: Chlorofluorocarbons in Pesticides Products
- Clinical Trials Database (CTD)
- 2008-09 Pesticides Residues and Metals in Processed Tomato Products
